name: Hot Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the cheese melts. Stir at the end of each minute.
3. Serve very hot with crisp corn chips for dipping. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
